'''tachuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycangium|mycangium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycangium|mycangium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tachuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæchikith|tæchikith]] || [[word:tæchikij|tæchikij]] || [[word:tæchikish|tæchikish]] || [[word:tæchiki|tæchiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tachuchukuth|tachuchukuth]] || [[word:tachuchukuj|tachuchukuj]] || [[word:tachuchukush|tachuchukush]] || [[word:tachuchuku|tachuchuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tachukuth|tachukuth]] || [[word:tachukuj|tachukuj]] || [[word:tachukush|tachukush]] || [[word:tachuku|tachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tachufkuth|tachufkuth]] || [[word:tachufkuj|tachufkuj]] || [[word:tachufkush|tachufkush]] || [[word:tachufkuf|tachufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tachukuthu|tachukuthu]] || [[word:tachukuju|tachukuju]] || [[word:tachukushu|tachukushu]] || [[word:tachukuku|tachukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tachukuth|tachukuth]] || [[word:tachukuj|tachukuj]] || [[word:tachukush|tachukush]] || [[word:tachuku|tachuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tachukuthul|tachukuthul]] || [[word:tachukujul|tachukujul]] || [[word:tachukushul|tachukushul]] || [[word:tachukukul|tachukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tachukuthuthu|tachukuthuthu]] || [[word:tachukujuju|tachukujuju]] || [[word:tachukushushu|tachukushushu]] || [[word:tachukuku|tachukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tachukuthun|tachukuthun]] || [[word:tachukujun|tachukujun]] || [[word:tachukushun|tachukushun]] || [[word:tachukukun|tachukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tachukuthuoro|tachukuthuoro]] || [[word:tachukujuoro|tachukujuoro]] || [[word:tachukushuoro|tachukushuoro]] || [[word:tachukukuoro|tachukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
